title: Man arrested following discovery of woman’s body in Knysna
description: KNYSNA - A 40-year-old man has been arrested...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA - A 40-year-old man has been arrested in connection with the death of a woman whose body was discovered near the Red Bridge in Knysna on 12 December 2025.","html":"KNYSNA - A 40-year-old man has been arrested in connection with the death of a woman whose body was discovered near the Red Bridge in Knysna on 12 December 2025."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Southern Cape SAPS spokesperson Warrant Officer Christopher Spies said in a statement that the arrest followed an investigation into the circumstances surrounding the woman’s death."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspect was taken into custody last night, Thursday 1st of January 2026, and remains in police custody.","html":"The suspect was taken into custody last night, Thursday 1st of January 2026, and remains in police custody."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to police, the man is expected to make his first appearance in the Knysna Magistrates’ Court on Monday, 5 January, where he will face a charge of murder.","html":"According to police, the man is expected to make his first appearance in the Knysna Magistrates’ Court on Monday, 5 January, where he will face a charge of murder."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Spies added that the investigation is still underway.","html":"Spies added that the investigation is still underway."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous article:","html":"Read previous article:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Body of woman found in bushes near Red Bridge","html":" Body of woman found in bushes near Red Bridge "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man arrested following discovery of woman’s body in Knysna
